software_category.title: Software Category
software_category.description: Capterra category name, for example Application Development or Website Builder.

total_products_to_scrape.title: Total Products
total_products_to_scrape.description: Maximum number of products to scrape.

review_pages_per_product.title: Review Pages Per Product
review_pages_per_product.description: Number of review pages to scrape for each product. Each page usually has 25 reviews.

max_cf_retries.title: Maximum Cloudflare Retries
max_cf_retries.description: Retry count when Cloudflare does not clear.

headless.title: Headless Browser
headless.description: Run without opening Chrome. Capterra may block this more often.

use_apify_proxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
use_apify_proxy.description: Use Apify Proxy in cloud runs. Recommended for Capterra.

proxy_groups.title: Proxy Groups
proxy_groups.description: Apify Proxy groups. Residential is recommended for Capterra.

proxy_country.title: Proxy Country
proxy_country.description: Two-letter country code for Apify Proxy.

cloudflare_cookies.title: Cloudflare Cookies
cloudflare_cookies.description: Optional Playwright cookies JSON array from a manually verified Capterra browser session.
